name: posterforge
description: Open-source skill and CLI for generating high-quality mobile text card posters from JSON.

scripts.render:all: pnpm render:alert && pnpm render:experiment && pnpm render:battle && pnpm render:incident && pnpm render:weekly && pnpm render:product
scripts.check: node ./bin/posterforge.mjs render ./examples/battle-ranking.json --out ./dist/check.png && node ./bin/posterforge.mjs render --style signal --title "Service Health" --summary "Errors are down and latency is stable." --item "Impact: One provider route was affected." --item "Action: Keep fallback enabled." --out ./dist/check-inline.png && node ./bin/posterforge.mjs render --preset alert-brief --out ./dist/check-preset.png && node ./bin/posterforge.mjs spec --style ledger --title "Alert Brief" --summary "Kong 4xx increased." --item "Cause: Upstream returned model-not-found." --out ./dist/check-spec.json && node ./bin/posterforge.mjs preset incident-review --out ./dist/check-preset-spec.json && node ./bin/posterforge.mjs skill-path && node ./bin/posterforge.mjs presets && node ./bin/posterforge.mjs templates
